name: Whole Wheat Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine flours and salt; cut in shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Sprinkle cold water (1 tablespoon at a time) evenly over the surface; stir with a fork until dry ingredients are moistened. Shape into a ball; chill.
To fit into pie plate, roll dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface. Place in a 9-inch pie plate; trim off excess pastry along edges. Fold edges under and flute. For baked pastry shell, prick the bottom and sides of the pastry generously with a fork. Bake at 400 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: pastry for one 9-inch pie.
